SequenceStep.description: One entry in a sequence file: path to a request definition, relative to the sequence file dir.

file.description: Path to a request file, relative to the sequence file’s directory.

description: Sequence document (JSON or YAML). Types live under [`crate::model`]; see [`crate::sequence`] to run.

initial_variables.description: Key–value pairs merged into [`crate::RuntimeEnv`] when the sequence session starts (after the process snapshot and, for the CLI, `--env` files).

name.description: Optional human-readable label (backward compatible when omitted).

title: SequenceFile
